name: Hu Shou
page_title: Hu Shou 壺壽 [Han, Li Jue] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Hu Shou was appointed Governor of Ji Province by the government at Chang’an in 193. He formed an alliance with the bandit leader Yu Du, but Yuan Shao sent a force against them under Tao Sheng that resulted in their deaths.

Source: [CITE=HIST:SGZ;Wei 6]

sections.short-biography: Formed an alliance with Yu Du, but was killed by Yuan Shao.

full_text:
Hu Shou 壺壽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Shou (壺壽). Formed an alliance with Yu Du, but was killed by Yuan Shao. Hu Shou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Li Jue. Hu Shou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
